name: ask-questions
description: Clarifying-question workflow for ambiguous requests that asks only the minimum needed to choose the right direction.

interface.longDescription: A focused Codex plugin for clarification discipline. It teaches the model to ask the smallest useful set of questions when a request is materially ambiguous, without blocking on things that can be resolved by quick low-risk discovery.
defaultPrompt: Ask only the minimum clarifying questions here
Check whether this request is underspecified first
